hints.text: British Overseas Territory (counts as UK); all **Gen3** w/ a unique long **'Gibraltar antenna'** (silver tip; else only parts of Spain)
The **Rock of Gibraltar** — a massive white-limestone mountain — dominates every part of the territory
Plates **white front / yellow back** (UK-style) but drives on the **right** (unlike the UK)
**English** on signs in a Mediterranean setting (also Malta)
Dense pastel buildings w/ **louvered wooden shutters** (green/blue/brown); December coverage → Christmas decorations
Famous **Barbary macaques** — the only wild monkeys in Europe; Ibrahim-al-Ibrahim mosque minarets (southernmost mosque in continental Europe)
